'''Crin Harson''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Crin Harson was discovered dead in his room on the resort world of [[Tralfin]], shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. A group of resting [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] personnel were implicated in the crime, but were later cleared of any murder charges.

{{Char-stub}}
